config: baseline (dense retrieval only, top_k=5, no rerank, no rewrite)

faithfulness.explanation: LLM answers are 91% faithful to retrieved context. Minimal hallucination.

factual_faithfulness.explanation: 81% of key facts correctly stated and traceable. 10-point gap vs holistic Faithfulness indicates coarse scoring overestimates quality — details are being missed.

answer_relevancy.explanation: Nearly perfect relevance. RAG almost never outputs off-topic answers.

mrr.explanation: Mean Reciprocal Rank. First relevant chunk appears at ~rank 1.3 on average. Good first-hit capability.

ndcg_at_5.explanation: NDCG@5 is only 38% of ideal ranking. Strong hit rate (0.93) but POOR ranking quality — this is the main retrieval weakness. Rerank is expected to improve this significantly.

hit_rate_at_5.explanation: 93% of questions have at least 1 relevant chunk in top-5. Knowledge base coverage is good.

avg_latency.explanation: Average end-to-end eval pipeline latency. Note: 6 Judge LLM calls run sequentially, inflating eval time. Production Q&A (no eval) is ~3-4s.

p95_latency.explanation: Tail latency 2x the average due to sequential Judge calls. Fix: parallelize eval LLM invocations via asyncio.gather.

four_quadrant_assessment.retrieval_precision: MRR 0.75 Good / NDCG 0.38 Weak — Ranking quality is the bottleneck
four_quadrant_assessment.generation_faithfulness: Faithfulness 0.91 Good / Factual 0.81 Needs attention — 19% of key details missed
four_quadrant_assessment.system_efficiency: Avg 5.0s — Sequential eval inflates; production Q&A ~3-4s

weaknesses: Poor ranking quality (NDCG@5 only 0.38) — Enable Rerank
19% key fact omission — Increase top_k or add query rewrite
Tail latency inflated by sequential eval calls — Parallelize Judge LLM
Holistic Faithfulness overestimates quality by 0.10 vs Factual checking
recommended_actions: Run full 4-config benchmark to quantify Rerank/Rewrite improvement
Use Factual Faithfulness as primary generation metric (more honest)
Parallelize 6 Judge LLM calls with asyncio.gather
Investigate the 1 question with Hit Rate=0 (discipline_001)
Add golden regression to CI pipeline
